'''davodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyonephritis|pyonephritis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyonephritis|pyonephritis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| davodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dævedheth|dævedheth]] || [[word:dævedhej|dævedhej]] || [[word:dævedhesh|dævedhesh]] || [[word:dævedhe|dævedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:davovodhoth|davovodhoth]] || [[word:davovodhoj|davovodhoj]] || [[word:davovodhosh|davovodhosh]] || [[word:davovodho|davovodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:davodhoth|davodhoth]] || [[word:davodhoj|davodhoj]] || [[word:davodhosh|davodhosh]] || [[word:davodho|davodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:davofdhoth|davofdhoth]] || [[word:davofdhoj|davofdhoj]] || [[word:davofdhosh|davofdhosh]] || [[word:davofdhof|davofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:davodhotho|davodhotho]] || [[word:davodhojo|davodhojo]] || [[word:davodhosho|davodhosho]] || [[word:davodhoko|davodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:davodhoth|davodhoth]] || [[word:davodhoj|davodhoj]] || [[word:davodhosh|davodhosh]] || [[word:davodho|davodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:davodhothol|davodhothol]] || [[word:davodhojol|davodhojol]] || [[word:davodhoshol|davodhoshol]] || [[word:davodhokol|davodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:davodhothotho|davodhothotho]] || [[word:davodhojojo|davodhojojo]] || [[word:davodhoshosho|davodhoshosho]] || [[word:davodhoko|davodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:davodhothon|davodhothon]] || [[word:davodhojon|davodhojon]] || [[word:davodhoshon|davodhoshon]] || [[word:davodhokon|davodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:davodhothoro|davodhothoro]] || [[word:davodhojoro|davodhojoro]] || [[word:davodhoshoro|davodhoshoro]] || [[word:davodhokoro|davodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
